scope.summary: Make doctor distinguish an intentionally absent signed auditor from a configured signing source or the fail-closed no-key startup refusal; do not infer an active auditor from the default audit path.
out_of_scope: Implementing the separate B8c unsigned refusal/security-event trail.
Resolving the existing unrelated oraclemcp-db compilation failure.

entry_points.name: doctor check 13 audit/state layout
entry_points.trace: CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target/ws-b-lower cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --lib doctor::tests::audit_posture_is_not_inferred_from_the_default_audit_path -- --exact: 1 passed. The test asserts keyless read-only output is audit: DISABLED with Skip status, a configured signer is described as configuration rather than an active auditor, and keyless writable output is Fail with ORACLEMCP_AUDIT_KEY_REQUIRED.

entry_points.name: binary startup-policy mapping
entry_points.trace: crates/oraclemcp/src/main_tests.rs adds doctor_audit_posture_matches_startup_audit_policy_without_opening_a_log for read-only DISABLED, writable no-key refusal, and configured signing source. Its cargo target was blocked before this test could run by pre-existing crate oraclemcp-db error E0425: oracle_error_envelope not found at crates/oraclemcp-db/src/error.rs:420 and :440.

limitations: No live Oracle result is claimed.
The binary-target unit test remains unrun because an unrelated dirty-tree oraclemcp-db compile error blocks the package.

known_defects.description: oraclemcp-db currently fails to compile because oracle_error_envelope is undefined at error.rs:420 and error.rs:440.

follow_ups: oraclemcp-091-b8c-refusal-trail-rhg0m remains open; doctor must add the explicitly labeled unsigned refusal-trail status only when that feature lands.
